creator: neimsaci@gmx.com
text: In both cases: manually loading and through rc.conf result is exactly the same. Module loads, screen goes black and shortly should return prompt, but remains black. Keyboard input works fine, reboot, shutdown -r now and CTRL-ALT-DEL works. Dmesg and kldstat does not showing anything abnormal, last line tells that drm is initialised on minor 0. Next should be framebuffer but it is not loaded. Tried with drm-kmod, drm-515-mood and with drm-510-kmod - same result. I run FreeBSD CURRENT-14.0 main-n263302-4f2cc73f34eb
